title: Celebration Crackers Mini Christmas Crackers - 6x 6 inch - Santa & Reindeer Christmas Party Decorations - FSC Mix Eco Crackers
features: FESTIVE SANTA & REINDEER DESIGN: These fun mini crackers feature a delightful Santa and reindeer theme, perfect for children's Christmas parties.
FUN STICKER CONTENTS: Each cracker includes a snap, hat, motto, and a selection of fun, vibrant stickers featuring festive and playful designs.
PERFECT FOR KIDS' PARTIES: Ideal for children’s Christmas parties or as fun decorations, these crackers bring joy to smaller table settings or party gatherings.
ECO-FRIENDLY CRACKERS: Made from FSC-certified materials, these crackers and their packaging are fully recyclable, ensuring a more sustainable celebration.
MINI 6-INCH SIZE: Each cracker measures 6 inches, making them a great addition to children's Christmas party tables or as fun little decorations.
description: FESTIVE SANTA & REINDEER DESIGN: These fun mini crackers feature a delightful Santa and reindeer theme, perfect for children's Christmas parties. FUN STICKER CONTENTS: Each cracker includes a snap, hat, motto, and a selection of fun, vibrant stickers featuring festive and playful designs. PERFECT FOR KIDS' PARTIES: Ideal for children’s Christmas parties or as fun decorations, these crackers bring joy to smaller table settings or party gatherings. ECO-FRIENDLY CRACKERS: Made from FSC-certified materials, these crackers and their packaging are fully recyclable, ensuring a more sustainable celebration. MINI 6-INCH SIZE: Each cracker measures 6 inches, making them a great addition to children's Christmas party tables or as fun little decorations. Make your children's Christmas party extra special with these fun Mini Santa & Reindeer Christmas Crackers . Perfectly sized for smaller hands, these delightful crackers feature charming Santa and reindeer designs, bringing festive cheer to any gathering. Inside each cracker, children will find a fun snap, a party hat, a motto, and a selection of colourful stickers featuring playful festive designs. Whether used as table decorations or for party games, these crackers are sure to be a hit with the little ones. Crafted from FSC-certified materials, these eco-friendly crackers and their packaging are fully recyclable, making them a more sustainable choice for your celebrations. At 6 inches in size, they're ideal for children's Christmas parties, adding an extra layer of fun to your festivities. FSC Certified Card, made from responsible sources Recyclable crackers except for the contents Recyclable packaging
